name: Charging the car battery
description: How to properly charge a car battery and restore its functionality.
label: Car battery

scenario.title: Charging the car battery
scenario.setting: The car has been parked for a long time and the battery is dead. Do you have a charger available?
scenario.objective: The user must charge the car battery correctly.

milestones.name: Disconnecting the battery from the vehicle
Connecting the charger the right way
Disconnecting the charger and reinstalling the battery

scenario.tutorial: Disconnect the battery first (minus pole first). Connect the charger correctly according to the polarity. Set the appropriate charging mode. After charging is complete, first turn off the charger and then unplug it. Reconnect the battery in the reverse order.

content.text: The car battery serves as a source of electrical energy for starting the engine and powering the vehicle's electronics. It can self-discharge when left standing for a long time.
Typical symptoms of a dead battery are weak starting or the complete impossibility of starting. Lights may also go out or the lighting may be dim.
Always disconnect the battery from the vehicle before charging. Connect the charger according to the correct polarity and make sure the device is switched off. Charge in a well-ventilated area.
After charging, first disconnect the battery from the charger and then reconnect it to the vehicle. Check the functionality of the starter and make sure that the contacts are tight.
